# Drone News 48h Brief — March 11, 2026

_Window: last 48 hours; 118 incidents._

## Summary
In the last 48 hours, multiple drone incidents, particularly near Dubai, caused significant disruptions to airport operations and safety. Notably, drone crashes and strikes related to escalating tensions with Iran resulted in injuries and flight cancellations at Dubai International Airport. Concurrently, in the U.S., two women were arrested for using drones disguised as crows to smuggle drugs into federal prisons, highlighting an ongoing trend of drone use in contraband smuggling. Reports of drone-related incidents are emerging globally, from contraband issues in Nigeria to drone crashes causing damage in Iraq, emphasizing a widespread need for tighter security measures and regulations regarding drone operations.

**By category:** airport: 16 • arrest: 2 • crash: 12 • other: 37 • smuggling: 47 • surveillance: 2 • terrorism: 2
**Top queries:** drone prison (23), drone incident (21), drone arrest (18), drone terrorism (15), drone crash (14)
